name: SwitchingProviders
description: Customer is asking about the process of switching broadband or TV providers — how switching works, what's involved, timelines, or what happens during a switch. They may be switching to Virgin Media or considering switching away. This is a process enquiry about switching, not a firm purchase decision or a firm cancellation.

sampleUtterances.utterance: How do I switch to {telecomProvidersSlot} ?
What's the process for switching broadband providers?
I'm thinking about switching to {telecomProvidersSlot}
How does switching providers work?
I want to switch my broadband to {telecomProvidersSlot}
Can you explain the switching process?
I'm a {customerType} customer and I want to switch to {telecomProvidersSlot}
What happens to my services if I switch provider?
How long does it take to switch to {telecomProvidersSlot} ?
I'm considering moving to a different provider
What do I need to do to switch to you from {telecomProvidersSlot} ?

I've been looking at {telecomProvidersSlot} — how would I go about switching?
Can I switch provider mid-contract?
Will there be any downtime if I switch to {telecomProvidersSlot} ?
I want to switch from {telecomProvidersSlot} to Virgin Media

What's the one touch switch process?
